widget.name: Mendix Kakao Map
widget.description: Kakao Map widget for Mendix — wraps lustre_kakaomap v1.0.0

property.caption: Kakao App Key
property.description: JavaScript App Key from Kakao Developers console

property.caption: SDK Libraries
property.description: Which Kakao SDK libraries to load

property.caption: Map ID
property.description: Unique identifier for the map instance
